settings.enabled_help: When enabled, new discussions will be automatically posted to your chosen Facebook destination.
settings.destination_type_help: Choose whether to post new discussions to a Facebook Page or a Facebook Group.
settings.page_id_help: The numeric ID of your Facebook Page (e.g. 123456789012345). Required when Destination Type is Facebook Page.
settings.page_access_token_help: Never-expiring Page Access Token from Meta for Developers (requires pages_manage_posts permission). Used when Destination Type is Facebook Page.
settings.group_id_help: The numeric ID of your Facebook Group. Required when Destination Type is Facebook Group.
settings.group_access_token_help: User Access Token with the publish_to_groups permission. Used when Destination Type is Facebook Group.
settings.graph_api_version_help: The Facebook Graph API version this extension calls (e.g. v19.0, v20.0). Bump this when Meta announces deprecation of the current version — see https://developers.facebook.com/docs/graph-api/changelog for the changelog and EOL schedule.

tag_selector.title: Post to Facebook for Primary Tags
tag_selector.help: Select which primary tags trigger a Facebook post.
tag_selector.help_all: Leave all unchecked to post every new discussion regardless of tag.
tag_selector.no_tags: No primary tags found. Install and configure the Flarum Tags extension first.
